description_long: This object is a large, multi-lane urban traffic control structure featuring an overhead gantry spanning six lanes of roadway. The gantry supports multiple traffic signal lights, circular road signs, and directional signboards, all mounted on a robust metal truss framework. The road surface is marked with white and yellow lane dividers, bordered by concrete sidewalks on both sides. The structure includes vertical support columns on either side of the road, with additional vertical poles supporting traffic lights and signage in the median. The overall appearance is industrial, with weathered metal and painted surfaces, typical of major city intersections or highway toll areas. The asset is designed to manage and direct high volumes of vehicular traffic efficiently.
description: A large, overhead metal gantry with multiple traffic lights, road signs, and directional boards spanning a six-lane urban roadway with concrete sidewalks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full array of traffic lights, circular road signs, and directional boards mounted on the overhead gantry above the six-lane road.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the gantry structure, the vertical support columns, and the alignment of the traffic lights and signs along the road.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the gantry, the supporting framework, and the reverse side of the traffic lights and signage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the metal truss structure, vertical poles, and the arrangement of the traffic lights from the other side of the road.
